</blockquote>
Hi, this is the webpage of Wei Xu. Welcome!<p>
Currently, I am a postdoc researcher in Tel Aviv University, Israel.<p>
I have been working on broad topics (phylogenetics, biogeography, large-scale biodiversity patterns, trait diversity&evolution, conservation, etc.), various groups (amphibian, reptile, mammal, birds, tropical plants), but mainly focused on macro-evoltion, macro-ecology and their intersection, and how to translate the theory into practical conservation planning.<p>
</blockquote>
